requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Samoa PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——萨摩亚光伏逆变器项目
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——薩摩亞光伏逆變器項目

summary.en: Samoa does not appear to operate a strong dedicated national standards body issuing PV inverter safety certificates. For grid-tied solar projects, safety acceptance is therefore likely to be handled through MCIL import context, OOTR electricity oversight, EPC grid-connection review, project-owner specifications, and financier requirements. Exporters should prepare IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test certificates and reports for the exact inverter model or model family, with installation manuals, markings, enclosure ratings, tropical derating data, and protective-device coordination suitable for Samoa conditions.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚似乎没有签发光伏逆变器安全证书的强专门国家标准机构。对于并网太阳能项目，安全验收因此可能通过MCIL进口背景、OOTR电力监管、EPC并网审查、项目业主规格和融资方要求处理。出口商应为具体逆变器型号或型号系列准备IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证书和报告，并提供适合萨摩亚条件的安装手册、标识、外壳等级、热带降额数据和保护器件协调资料。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞似乎沒有簽發光伏逆變器安全證書的強專門國家標準機構。對於併網太陽能項目，安全驗收因此可能通過MCIL進口背景、OOTR電力監管、EPC併網審查、項目業主規格和融資方要求處理。出口商應為具體逆變器型號或型號系列準備IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證書和報告，並提供適合薩摩亞條件的安裝手冊、標識、外殼等級、熱帶降額數據和保護器件協調資料。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
MCIL import and product documentation context
OOTR / EPC electricity project review practice

summary.en: China-side safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 reports, voluntary CQC or CGC certification, and manufacturer test reports. These are domestic China baselines and may support product due diligence, but they are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for Samoa projects, especially where donor, utility, or project-owner specifications call for IEC certificates.
summary.zh: 中国侧安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004报告、自愿性CQC或CGC认证，以及制造商测试报告。这些是中国国内基准，可支持产品尽调，但并不自动等同于萨摩亚项目的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，尤其是在捐助方、公用事业或项目业主规格要求IEC证书时。
summary.zht: 中國側安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004報告、自願性CQC或CGC認證，以及製造商測試報告。這些是中國國內基準，可支持產品盡調，但並不自動等同於薩摩亞項目的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，尤其是在捐助方、公用事業或項目業主規格要求IEC證書時。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: a China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file is not enough for a Samoa IEC-oriented project package. Obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and type-test reports from an accredited laboratory covering the supplied model, firmware, cooling method, enclosure, and accessories. Add Samoa-specific installation controls for heat, humidity, corrosion, surge exposure, and grid voltage settings because Samoa's nominal 230/400 V supply differs from China's 220/380 V nominal supply.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不足以构成面向IEC的萨摩亚项目包。应从认可实验室取得涵盖供货型号、固件、冷却方式、外壳和附件的IEC 62109-1/-2证书及型式试验报告。还应加入针对萨摩亚热、湿、腐蚀、浪涌暴露和电网电压设置的安装控制，因为萨摩亚230/400 V标称供电不同于中国220/380 V标称供电。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不足以構成面向IEC的薩摩亞項目包。應從認可實驗室取得涵蓋供貨型號、韌體、冷卻方式、外殼和附件的IEC 62109-1/-2證書及型式試驗報告。還應加入針對薩摩亞熱、濕、腐蝕、浪湧暴露和電網電壓設定的安裝控制，因為薩摩亞230/400 V標稱供電不同於中國220/380 V標稱供電。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and mandatory where EPC, project-owner, donor, financier, or procurement documents require IEC 62109 evidence; no single Samoa PV inverter safety certificate has been identified
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — China GB/T, CQC, or CGC evidence can support domestic conformity but is not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence for Samoa

source.publisher: Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour, Samoa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build the Samoa safety file around IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence, not China-only GB/T or NB/T reports. Confirm with MCIL, OOTR, EPC, the project owner, and any financier whether the supplied model family and installation conditions are covered before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 萨摩亚安全文件应以IEC 62109-1/-2证据为核心，而不是仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T报告。出货前应与MCIL、OOTR、EPC、项目业主及任何融资方确认供货型号系列和安装条件是否被覆盖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 薩摩亞安全文件應以IEC 62109-1/-2證據為核心，而不是僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T報告。出貨前應與MCIL、OOTR、EPC、項目業主及任何融資方確認供貨型號系列和安裝條件是否被覆蓋。
